mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM SSQ.IC_EDU_TGT_JKW WHERE 1 = 1 AND EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID} AND JKW_NO IN (
SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{JKW_NO}, '[^,]+',1,LEVEL) FROM DUAL CONNECT BY REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{JKW_NO} , '[^,]+' , 1, LEVEL) IS NOT NULL )
DELETE FROM SSQ.RBA_ATTCH_FILE A WHERE A.ATTCH_FILE_NO = (SELECT B.ATTCH_FILE_NO FROM IC_EDU_M B WHERE B.EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO IC_EDU_TGT_JKW ( EDU_ID, NOTE_CTNT, -- 사용하지 않는 컬럼에 "성명" JKW_NO, EDU_TGT_CCD, -- 사용하지 않는 컬럼에 "직위" DPRT_CD, ING_YN, ING_DT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO )VALUES ( #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{POSITION_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL((SELECT TRIM(TO_CHAR(DEP_ID , '9999999999')) AS DPRT_CD FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_TITLE = #{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , SUBSTR(#{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 1,10) ), #{ING_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ING_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO SSQ.IC_EDU_TGT_JKW ( EDU_ID, NOTE_CTNT, -- 사용하지 않는 컬럼에 "성명" JKW_NO, EDU_TGT_CCD, -- 사용하지 않는 컬럼에 "직위" DPRT_CD, ING_YN, ING_DT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO )VALUES ( #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{POSITION_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL((SELECT TRIM(TO_CHAR(DEP_ID , '9999999999')) AS DPRT_CD FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_TITLE = #{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , SUBSTR(#{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 1,10) ), #{ING_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ING_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO SSQ.IC_EDU_TGT_JKW USING DUAL ON ( EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JKW_NO = #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
NOTE_CTNT = #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EDU_TGT_CCD = #{POSITION_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ING_YN = #{ING_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ING_DT = #{ING_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DPRT_CD = NVL((SELECT TRIM(TO_CHAR(DEP_ID , '9999999999')) AS DPRT_CD FROM SSQ.C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_TITLE = #{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , SUBSTR(#{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 1,10) ),
CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( EDU_ID, NOTE_CTNT, -- 사용하지 않는 컬럼에 "성명" JKW_NO, EDU_TGT_CCD, -- 사용하지 않는 컬럼에 "직위" DPRT_CD, ING_YN, ING_DT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO )VALUES ( #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{POSITION_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL((SELECT TRIM(TO_CHAR(DEP_ID , '9999999999')) AS DPRT_CD FROM SSQ.C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_TITLE = #{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) , SUBSTR(#{DEP_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 1,10) ), #{ING_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ING_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

UPDATE SET IC_EDU_TGT_JKW ( EDU_ID, JKW_NO, DPRT_CD, ING_YN, ING_DT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO )VALUES ( #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{DEP_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ING_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ING_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(EDU_ID), 0) + 1 AS EDU_ID_SEQ FROM IC_EDU_M
SELECT EDU_ID_SEQ.nextval AS EDU_ID_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT C_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS EDU_ID_SEQ FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO IC_EDU_M ( EDU_ID, -- 교육ID DR_DPRT_CD, -- 등록부서코드 EDU_NM, -- 교육명(과정명) CRE_OGN_CCD, -- 생성기관구분코드(제작기관)_A401 , 교육기관
OGN_NM, -- 기관명
EDU_CCD, -- 교육구분코드(교육형태)_A402 EDU_STS_CD, -- 교육상태코드(진행상태)_A405 EDU_START_DT, -- 교육시작일 EDU_END_DT, -- 교육종료일 EDU_POS, -- 교육위치(교육장소) EDU_HH, -- 교육시간(시) TCHR_NM, -- 강사명 TCHR_HIST, -- 강사약력 EDU_OBJ_CTNT, -- 교육목적내용(교육목적) ATTCH_FILE_NO, -- 첨부파일파일번호 EDU_STD_CNT, -- 교육 대상자 수 EDU_ESTD_CNT, -- 교육 수료자 수 EDU_CHK_YN, -- 이해도 점검 여부
TCHR_CERT_CCD, -- 교육대상 중 (직접입력) 대상
DR_DT, -- 등록일자 DR_TIME, -- 등록시간 DR_OP_JKW_NO, -- 등록조작자번호 CHG_DT, -- 변경일자 CHG_TIME, -- 변경시간 CHG_OP_JKW_NO -- 변경조작자번호 )VALUES( #{EDU_ID}, #{DR_DPRT_CD}, #{EDU_NM}, #{CRE_OGN_CCD},
#{OGN_NM},
#{EDU_CCD}, #{EDU_STS_CD}, #{EDU_START_DT}, #{EDU_END_DT}, #{EDU_POS}, #{EDU_HH}, #{TCHR_NM}, #{TCHR_HIST}, #{EDU_OBJ_CTNT}, #{ATTCH_FILE_NO}, #{EDU_STD_CNT}, #{EDU_ESTD_CNT}, #{EDU_CHK_YN},
#{TCHR_CERT_CCD},
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO} )

INSERT INTO SSQ.IC_EDU_TGT_CCD (EDU_ID, EDU_TGT_CCD, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO) VALUES( #{EDU_ID}, #{EDU_TGT_CCD}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.EDU_ID, A.DR_DPRT_CD, A.EDU_NM, A.CRE_OGN_CCD, A.OGN_NM, A.EDU_CCD, B.EDU_TGT_CCD AS EDU_TGT_CCD, B.EDU_TGT_CCD_NM AS EDU_TGT_CCD_NM, A.EDU_STS_CD, A.EDU_START_DT, A.EDU_END_DT, A.EDU_POS, A.EDU_HH, A.ING_R, A.TCHR_NM, A.TCHR_HIST, A.TCHR_CERT_CCD, A.EDU_OBJ_CTNT, A.EDU_STD_CNT, A.EDU_ESTD_CNT, A.EDU_CHK_YN, A.ATTCH_FILE_NO, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.DR_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DR_DT , A.DR_TIME, A.DR_OP_JKW_NO, A.CHG_DT, A.CHG_TIME, A.CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM SSQ.IC_EDU_M A INNER JOIN ( SELECT EDU_ID, LISTAGG(GET_CODE_NAME('A403', EDU_TGT_CCD), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EDU_ID) AS EDU_TGT_CCD_NM, LISTAGG(EDU_TGT_CCD, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EDU_ID) AS EDU_TGT_CCD FROM SSQ.IC_EDU_TGT_CCD GROUP BY EDU_ID ) B ON A.EDU_ID = B.EDU_ID INNER JOIN SSQ.C_DEP_INFO C ON A.DR_DPRT_CD = C.DEP_DESC WHERE 1=1 AND A.EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID}

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() over (order by T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER) AS CNT, T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, SSQ.GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM SSQ.RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SSQ.IC_EDU_M T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER

SELECT T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER, T01.DATA_G, T01.FILE_POS, T01.LOSC_FILE_NM, T01.PHSC_FILE_NM, T01.FILE_SIZE, T01.DOWNLOAD_CNT, T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO, SSQ.GET_LOGINID_NAME(T01.DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, T01.DR_DT FROM SSQ.RBA_ATTCH_FILE T01 , SSQ.IC_EDU_M T02 WHERE T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO = T02.ATTCH_FILE_NO AND T02.EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID} ORDER BY T01.ATTCH_FILE_NO, T01.FILE_SER
SELECT EDU_TGT_CCD FROM SSQ.IC_EDU_TGT_CCD WHERE EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID} ORDER BY EDU_TGT_CCD
mapper.update: UPDATE IC_EDU_M SET EDU_STS_CD = #{EDU_STS_CD}, EDU_END_DT = to_char(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_DT = to_char(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = to_char(sysdate, 'hh24miss'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO} WHERE EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT A.EDU_ID, A.EDU_NM, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.EDU_START_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EDU_START_DT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.EDU_END_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EDU_END_DT, GET_CODE_NAME('A401',A.CRE_OGN_CCD) AS CRE_OGN, GET_CODE_NAME('A402',A.EDU_CCD) AS EDU_TYPE, B.EDU_TGT_CCD_NM AS EDU_TGT, A.EDU_POS, A.EDU_HH FROM IC_EDU_M A INNER JOIN ( SELECT EDU_ID, LISTAGG(GET_CODE_NAME('A403', EDU_TGT_CCD), ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EDU_ID) AS EDU_TGT_CCD_NM, LISTAGG(EDU_TGT_CCD, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EDU_ID) AS EDU_TGT_CCD FROM IC_EDU_TGT_CCD GROUP BY EDU_ID ) B ON A.EDU_ID = B.EDU_ID AND A.EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.EMPY_NO AS USER_ID -- 사원번호 ,A.EMPY_NAME AS USER_NM -- 사원명 ,A.PDSS_CLAS_CODE AS POSITION_CODE -- 직급코드 ,A.PDSS_CLAS_NAME AS POSITION_NM -- 직급명 ,A.DTBR_CODE AS DEP_ID -- 부지점코드 , (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = A.DTBR_CODE) AS DEP_NM FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_EMPLOYEE A WHERE A.EMPY_NO BETWEEN '000000' AND '999999' AND A.PDSS_USER_STAS_SECT_CODE NOT IN ('D') AND A.EMPY_NAME LIKE '%' || #{USER_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'

SELECT C.LOGIN_ID, C.USER_NM, D.DEP_ID, D.DEP_TITLE, D.DEP_DESC FROM C_USER C JOIN C_DEP_INFO D ON C.DEP_ID = D.DEP_ID AND C.USER_NM= #{JKW_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND C.LOGIN_ID= #{JKW_NO} AND D.DEP_TITLE= #{DPRT_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO IC_EDU_TGT_JKW A USING (SELECT C.LOGIN_ID, C.USER_NM, D.DEP_ID, D.DEP_TITLE, D.DEP_DESC FROM C_USER C, C_DEP_INFO D WHERE C.DEP_ID = D.DEP_ID AND C.USER_NM= #{JKW_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.DEP_TITLE= #{DPRT_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) T ON ( A.EDU_ID = #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.JKW_NO = #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.JKW_NO = T.LOGIN_ID AND A.DPRT_CD = T.DEP_DESC ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET EDU_TGT_CCD = #{EDU_TGT_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ING_YN = #{ING_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOTE_CTNT = #{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( EDU_ID, JKW_NO, DPRT_CD, EDU_TGT_CCD, ING_YN, NOTE_CTNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{EDU_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DPRT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{EDU_TGT_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{ING_YN, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{NOTE_CTNT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY DPRT_CD, USER_NM) AS CNT, A.EDU_ID, D.DEP_TITLE AS DPRT_NM, A.JKW_NO, C.USER_NM AS JKW_NM, SUM(CASE WHEN A.ING_YN = 'Y' THEN B.EDU_HH ELSE 0 END) OVER(PARTITION BY A.JKW_NO) AS EDU_SUM_HH, -- 시간 합산은 이수여부가 Y 일때만 GET_CODE_NAME('A403',A.EDU_TGT_CCD) AS EDU_TGT, A.ING_YN, B.EDU_NM, B.EDU_HH, B.EDU_START_DT, B.EDU_END_DT FROM IC_EDU_TGT_JKW A, IC_EDU_M B, C_USER C, C_DEP_INFO D WHERE A.EDU_ID=B.EDU_ID AND
B.EDU_START_DT >= #{stDate} AND B.EDU_END_DT <= #{edDate} AND
C.LOGIN_ID = A.JKW_NO AND A.DPRT_CD = D.DEP_ID
AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT DPRT_CD FROM C_DEP_INFO)
AND (C.USER_NM LIKE '%'||#{JKW_NM}||'%')
AND (A.JKW_NO = #{JKW_NO})
AND (B.EDU_NM LIKE '%'||#{EDU_NM}||'%')
AND A.EDU_TGT_CCD = #{EDU_TGT_CCD}
AND A.ING_YN = #{ING_YN}
ORDER BY CNT

SELECT ROWNUM AS SEQ ,JKW_NO ,JKW_NM ,DPRT_NM ,DPRT_CD ,CAMS ,KCAMS ,TPAC1 ,TPAC2 ,ANTI_LANDER_AG_PRO ,ANTI_LANDER_AG_FU ,BRAN_COMP_OFFI ,SKK_UNI_FIN_LEAD ,E_MK_ANTI_LANDER_COURSE ,DK_UNI_MASTER_COURSE ,APL_PNT FROM (SELECT A.JKW_NO AS JKW_NO ,MAX(C.USER_NM) AS JKW_NM ,MAX(D.DEP_TITLE) AS DPRT_NM ,MAX(A.DPRT_CD) AS DPRT_CD ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1001' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS CAMS ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1002' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS KCAMS ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1003' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS TPAC1 ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1004' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS TPAC2 ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1005' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS ANTI_LANDER_AG_PRO ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1006' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS ANTI_LANDER_AG_FU ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1007' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS BRAN_COMP_OFFI ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1008' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS SKK_UNI_FIN_LEAD ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1009' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS E_MK_ANTI_LANDER_COURSE ,MAX(CASE WHEN B.CERT_CCD ='1010' THEN B.ACQ_DT ELSE '-' END) AS DK_UNI_MASTER_COURSE ,MAX(A.APL_PNT) AS APL_PNT FROM IC_CERT_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN IC_CERT_CCD B ON A.JKW_NO = B.JKW_NO, C_USER C, C_DEP_INFO D, (SELECT JKW_NO FROM IC_CERT_CCD
WHERE CERT_CCD = #{CERT_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
) T WHERE C.LOGIN_ID = A.JKW_NO AND D.DEP_DESC = A.DPRT_CD
AND #{branchCode} IN (SELECT DPRT_CD FROM C_DEP_INFO)
AND A.JKW_NO=T.JKW_NO
AND (C.USER_NM LIKE '%'||#{QUA_NAME}||'%')
GROUP BY A.JKW_NO ORDER BY DPRT_NM ) ORDER BY ROWNUM
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM IC_CERT_M WHERE JKW_NO = #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM IC_CERT_CCD WHERE JKW_NO = #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT C.LOGIN_ID, C.USER_NM, D.DEP_ID, D.DEP_TITLE, D.DEP_DESC FROM C_USER C, C_DEP_INFO D WHERE C.DEP_ID = D.DEP_ID AND C.USER_NM= #{JKW_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND D.DEP_TITLE= #{DPRT_NM, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO IC_CERT_CCD ( ACQ_DT, JKW_NO, CERT_CCD, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{ACQ_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{CERT_CCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO IC_CERT_M A USING DUAL ON ( A.JKW_NO = #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.DPRT_CD = #{DPRT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET APL_PNT = #{APL_PNT}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( JKW_NO, DPRT_CD, APL_PNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{DPRT_CD, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{APL_PNT} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24MISS') ,#{OP_JKW_NO, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
